mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (clothes_details, price, status, user_id, address, time) VALUES (#{clothesDetails}, #{price}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{address}, #{time})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_order ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT o.* FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND o.status = #{status}
ORDER BY o.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT o.* FROM t_order o JOIN t_order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.operator_id = #{operatorId} ORDER BY o.id DESC
